Trigger.name: infogate
Trigger.script:
aard.continueinfo = aard.continueinfo or getLineNumber() aard.foundmatch = aard.foundmatch or false
if aard.continueinfo == getLineNumber() - 1 then if aard.foundmatch == false then appendBuffer("All") appendBuffer("Spouse") end end aard.continueinfo = getLineNumber() aard.foundmatch = false selectCurrentLine() copy() --echo(getLineNumber()) --echo(matches[2])

Trigger.name: endCapture
Trigger.script: if string.find(matches[2], "INFO") then --do nothing else aard.continueinfo = false if aard.foundmatch==false then appendBuffer("All") appendBuffer("Spouse") end setTriggerStayOpen("infogate",0) end

regexCodeList.string: ^INFO: (?:The valkyries come for |You hear a loud scream as )?(\w+) (who was slain|is brutally killed|has been (removed from this realm|killed)) by( a direct hit from)? (.*)\.$
^INFO: The last post plays mournfully as (.*) falls in battle to (.*)\.$
^INFO: (.*)\'s? blood is spilled by (.*) and the earth runs crimson\. $
^INFO: Silence falls as (.*) is slain by (.*)\.$
^INFO: Knights race from the stronghold to avenge the death of (.*) to (.*)\.$
^INFO: Without a glimpse of hesitation\, (.*) performs the seppuku\, assisted by (.*)\.$
^INFO: Radience embraces (.*) who died valiantly in combat against (.*)\.$
^INFO: The heavens part as (.*) is sent by (.*) to the Nameless One\'s embrace\.$
^INFO: Tormented spirits wail in requiem as dark flames ravage the soul of (.*)\, slain by (.*)\.$
^INFO: A mountain fades as (.*) dies to (.*)\.$
^INFO: The pirates prepare a burial at sea for (.*)\, slain by (.*)\.$
^INFO: The Tribes prepare a ritual for (.*)\. Hunters are sent after (.*) for revenge\.$
^INFO: (.*)\'s? knowledge couldn\'t save them from (.*)\.$
^INFO: (.*) is sent with a blood curdling scream by (.*) to meet Taboo\.$
^INFO: (.*) and (.*) have an Oscar\-winning final scene\!$
^INFO: (.*)\, cursing (.*)\, embraces death and returns to the Dark One\.$
^INFO: A scream of vengeance is heard as Dak\'kon revives (.*) to claim their revenge on (.*)\.$
^INFO: The Three Moons mourn the passing of (.*) at the hands of (.*)\.$
^INFO: The Cwn Annwn emerge in a frenzy with (.*) in their midst\, savagely hunting down (.*)\.$
^INFO: (.*)\'s? journalistic integrity crumbles in the affair known as (.*)gate\.$
^INFO: (.*) is cut down in the midst of bloody warfare by (.*)\.$
^INFO: You hear a faint rendition of \"Taps\" as (.*) is slain by (.*)\.$
^INFO: (.*)\'s? Chi has been unbalanced by (.*)\, and (he|she|it) begins (his|her|its) journey anew\.$
^INFO: (.*) is slain by (.*) and is borne on swift wings to seek Vorel\'s embrace\.$
^INFO: Stendarr cries tears of Anguish as (.*) is slain by (.*)\!$
^INFO: (.*) has attained a better understanding of death\, thanks to (.*)\!$
^INFO: Valiant to the end\, (.*) has fallen to (.*) in battle\.$
^INFO: Nobody mourns the death of outcast (.*)\, slain by (.*)\.$
^INFO: (.*) yells \'Death before Dishonor\' and then chooses death\.$
^INFO: (.*) sneaks a peek at Vorel\'s cleavage and pays the ultimate price\.$
^INFO: (.*) attempts to divide by zero\, with catastrophic results\!$
^INFO: A tear falls from Athena\'s eye as (.*) throws (him|her|it)self from the parapets\.$
^INFO: Without a moments hesitation\, (.*) makes the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Stendarr\.$
^INFO: Though (.*) falls in battle\, The Revolution carries on\.$
^INFO: You did not know it was possible to keelhaul yourself. (.*) demonstrates\.$
^INFO: (.*) has fallen to the dire\.$
^INFO: With no virgins left\, Xiuhtecuhtli accepts the ultimate sacrifice of (.*)\.$
^INFO: A raven\'s caw echoes in the grove as (.*) walks into the veil to the Otherworld\.$
^INFO: (.*) bursts into flames as (he|she|it) draws too deeply on the True Source\.$
^INFO: (.*) slips while dancing on the oars and plummets to (his|her|its) death\.$
^INFO: (.*) slits their throat to escape only to be reborn a little stronger\.$
^INFO: The everlasting flames burn brighter as (.*)\'s? soul fades into eternal darkness\.$
^INFO: Apollyon's intervention saves (.*) from unending death\.$
^INFO: (.*) raises a level. Now up to level \d+\.$
^INFO: (.*) adds another \d+ pages to (his|her|its) research\!$
^INFO: Stendarr\'s angel sings praises to (.*) for attaining level \d+\!$
^INFO: Screams echo through the mist as (.*) sacrifices \d+ captives to Xiuhtecuhtli\.$
^INFO: The minions of darkness squeal in terror as (.*) reaches level \d+\.$
^INFO: Dragons belch fire and Vorel exults as (.*) slays \d+ villains\.$
^INFO: (.*) spirals towards insanity as (he|she|it) draws \d+ percent more from the True Power\.$
^INFO: (.*) frantically fumbles for a pen to write down a new haiku for gaining level \d+\!$
^INFO: (.*) has gained both knowledge and understanding\, advancing in power to level \d+\.$
^INFO: The Three Moons blaze in glory as (.*) reaches level \d+\.$
^INFO: Weapons gleam and trumpets sound from the Crusader\'s grand temple as (.*) leads \d+ Holy Knights on a quest for another holy artifact\.$
^INFO: Raising their sword in honor to Athena\, (.*) attains level \d+\.$
^INFO: The pirates plunder nearby villages to celebrate (.*) reaching level \d+\!$
^INFO: (.*) has achieved level \d+ of military training\.$
^INFO: Thor\'s hammer shatters the earth\, sending lightning across the land as (.*) gains level \d+\.$
^INFO: Clans start to panic as raider (.*) obtains level \d+\.$
^INFO: A sip of Kyrridwen\'s brew imparts guarded knowledge as (.*) gains level \d+\.$
^INFO: Battle may have taken its toll but through constant training (.*) has obtained level \d+\.$
^INFO: A bell tolls in the darkness as (.*) leads \d+ souls to eternal misery\.$
^INFO: (.*) is surrounded by the souls of \d+ legendary samurai and ninjas who bestow their approval\.$
^INFO: The voice of Dak\'kon leads (.*) to level \d+\.$
^INFO: (.*) scours the land in search of enlightenment\, purging another \d+ souls by the cold steel of Apollyon\'s blade\.$
^INFO: Working in the shadows\, (.*) gathers \d+ followers of The Revolution\.$
^INFO: (.*) successfully fends off another libel lawsuit\! \(Full story on page \d+\!\)$
^INFO: The black stone guides (.*) into gaining level \d+\!$
^INFO: The wind of duality strengthens\, as (.*) aligns (him|her|it)self \d+ steps closer with Tao\.$
^INFO: Another battalion falls before (.*) as (he|she|it) raises to level \d+\.$
^INFO: Nobody cares as the outcast (.*) reaches level \d+\.$
^INFO: The mighty hero (.*) has increased in power\!$
^INFO: (.*) becomes stronger as (he|she|it) practices (?:his|her|its) skills for battle\.$
^INFO: Stones fall from the high mountains as (.*) increases in strength\!$
^INFO: (.*) takes a step closer to Nirvana as (his|her|its) power increases\.$
^INFO: Mild mannered reporter (.*) leaps into a nearby phone booth\, mistaking it for a dressing room\!$
^INFO: You hear slight whispers as (.*) helps The Revolution grow\.$
^INFO: (.*) just beat Aardwolf\.\.\.again\.$
^INFO: (.*) amasses new power and leads the Dark Templars in new rituals to Dak\'kon\.$
^INFO: Not a sound is heard as (.*) crosses the nightingale floor and steals your last breath\.$
^INFO: (.*) culls more souls and watches them ignite as Sorrow stokes the inferno\.$
^INFO: Reflecting from constant battle\, (.*)\'s strength radiates within\.$
^INFO: Another tale about (.*) is written in the Book of Mabinogian\.$
^INFO: Blood drips from (.*)\'s weapon as they turn their gaze towards you\.$
^INFO: (.*)\'s hammer shatters the earth, sending lightning across the land\.$
^INFO: Bloodied but victorious\, (.*) rises and screams \"Veni Vidi Vici\!\"$
^INFO: Blood gushes from the latest sacrifice as (.*) gains the approval of Xiuhtecuhtli\.$
^INFO: There is rejoicing in the Temple as Crusader Hero (.*) increases in power\!$
^INFO: Orchestral music swells as (.*) completes another rousing verse in the epic Song of Aardwolf\.$
^INFO: People burn and villages flee in terror as (.*) conquers more of the world\.$
^INFO: The True Source floods (.*) with Power\.$
^INFO: A sword is drawn as Draconian fury pulses through (.*)\.$
^INFO: A magnificent light shines before (.*) leading them toward the virtue of Radience\.$
^INFO: (.*) kneels in worship to Athena in celebration of another glorious victory\.$
^INFO: The genius (?<name>.*) has found another way to avoid remorting\!$
^INFO: The very Fabric of Magic shudders as (.*)\'s power increases\.$
^INFO: Stendarr smiles as his holy champion\, (.*)\, triumphs over evil\!$
^INFO: Energy flows through (.*) as s?he gains understanding\!$
^Welcome to Aardwolf. May your adventures be mystical, challenging and rewarding.$
<MAPSTART>

Trigger.name: capture
Trigger.script: --echo("\ncaptured value: " .. matches[2] .. " .\n") if matches[2] == "<MAPSTART>" or matches[2] == "<MAPEND>" or matches[2] == "<MAPEND>" then deleteLine() else selectString(line, 1) copy() appendBuffer("minimap") deleteLine() end

regexCodeList.string: <MAPEND>

Trigger.name: exitsCheck
Trigger.script: if string.match(matches[2], "other") then --temp disabled, portals being set for skills/spells setRoomChar(gmcp.room.info.num, ">") --aard.other = true else aard.other = false end if string.find(matches[2], "(north)", 0, true) then setDoor(gmcp.room.info.num, "n", 2) setDoor(gmcp.room.info.exits["n"], aard.reverse_dirs["n"], 2) end if string.find(matches[2], "(south)", 0, true) then setDoor(gmcp.room.info.num, "s", 2) setDoor(gmcp.room.info.exits["s"], aard.reverse_dirs["s"], 2) end if string.find(matches[2], "(east)", 0, true) then setDoor(gmcp.room.info.num, "e", 2) setDoor(gmcp.room.info.exits["e"], aard.reverse_dirs["e"], 2) end if string.find(matches[2], "(west)", 0, true) then setDoor(gmcp.room.info.num, "w", 2) setDoor(gmcp.room.info.exits["w"], aard.reverse_dirs["w"], 2) end if string.find(matches[2], "(up)", 0, true) then setDoor(gmcp.room.info.num, "up", 2) setDoor(gmcp.room.info.exits["u"], aard.reverse_dirs["u"], 2) end if string.find(matches[2], "(down)", 0, true) then setDoor(gmcp.room.info.num, "down", 2) setDoor(gmcp.room.info.exits["d"], aard.reverse_dirs["d"], 2) end

Trigger.name: healthPotionTracker
Trigger.script: aard.hpot = tonumber(matches[2]) or 1 local hp_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.hp, aard.maxhp)) Health:setValue(aard.hp, aard.maxhp,"   "..aard.hp.."hp | "..string.format("%i", hp_pct).."%   ("..aard.hpot..")") -- Clan lvl Health (Heal) -- Masaki 201 -=Warm Sake=- -- Tao 201 Little Jade Pill [EXTREME] -- Shadkil 201 a mysterious black pill -- Pyre 201 Whispers in the Twilight -- Touchston 60 (>TouchStone<) Blue Gem Extract -- Perdition 60 + Eternity + -- Dragon 60 White Dragon's Blood -- Gaardian 60 Grande Caramel Macchiato -- Tao 60 -=[ Healing Power of the Jade Dragon ]=- -- Dominion 60 Jade Elixir -- Bard 60 Healer's Ballad -- Pyre 60 A Bitter Reprieve -- Crimson 60 Vigor -- masaki 60 -=Salve of Seikenji=- -- Seekers 60 (Seekers) Potion of Healing -- Crusader 60 Salvation -- DoH 60 Healing Touch -- Tanelorn 60 Tranquility's Healing Touch -- loqui 60 :::Angel's Breath::: -- druid 60 \|/ Ogham Bark \|/ -- Aylor 1 (!(Light Relief)!) \(!\(Light Relief\)!\)|\(!\(Serious Relief\)!\)|\(!\(Critical Care\)!\) -- Aylor 20 (!(Serious Relief)!) -- Aylor 40 (!(Critical Care)!)

regexCodeList.string: ^(?:\([ ]*(\d+)\)| ) (?:\(.*?\) |)(?:Academy Healing Potion|a mysterious black pill|\(!\(Light Relief\)!\)|\(!\(Serious Relief\)!\)|\(!\(Critical Care\)!\)|White Dragon's Blood|Whispers in the Twilight|Grande Caramel Macchiato|Jade Elixir|Healer's Ballad|A Bitter Reprieve|Vigor|Salvation|Healing Touch|Tranquility's Healing Touch|-=Warm Sake=-|-=Salve of Seikenji=-|:::Angel's Breath:::|\+ Eternity \+|Little Jade Pill \[EXTREME\]|\(>TouchStone<\) Blue Gem Extract|-=\[ Healing Power of the Jade Dragon \]=-|\(Seekers\) Potion of Healing|\\\|/ Ogham Bark \\\|/).*\)$

Trigger.name: manaPotionTracker
Trigger.script: aard.spot = tonumber(matches[2]) or 1 local mp_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.mp, aard.maxmp)) Mana:setValue(aard.mp, aard.maxmp,"   "..aard.mp.."mp | "..string.format("%i", mp_pct).."%   ("..aard.spot..")") -- Clan lvl Mana (black lotus) -- Dominion 201 Moonlight Wine -- Masaki 201 -=Shogun's Viagra Shot=- -- Tao 201 -=[ Essence of the Jade Dragon ]=- -- Seekers 201 (Seekers) Potion of Lotus Flower -- Touchston201 (>TouchStone<) Sardonyx Gem Extract -- Pyre 201 Sigil of Solitude -- Crimson 200 Meade of the Gods -- DoH 200 Flourish of Magic -- Tanelorn 200 Philter of Peace -- Dragon 200 -=*)Dragon's Breath(*=- -- Romani 180 ^*^Darane Svatura^*^ -- Tanelorn 180 Prosperity -- Touchston175 (>Touchstone<) Diamond Gem extract -- Dominion 150 Ancestral Power -- Seekers 150 (Seekers) Potion of Lotus Bloom -- Touchston150 (>TouchStone<) Amethyst Gem Extract -- Bard 130 Bag o' Buttery Showtime Popcorn -- Touchston125 (>Touchstone<) Citrine Gem Extract -- Tanelorn 120 Terrill's Energy Tonic -- Gaardian 120 Ice Cold Arnold Palmer -- Crusader 100 Epiphany -- Seekers 100 (Seekers) Potion of Lotus Bud -- loqui 100 :::Revolution's Calling::: -- Dragon 100 Vorel's Lightning -- Tao 91 -=[ Blood of the Jade Dragon ]=- -- Dominion 90 Call upon spirits -- Touchston 85 (>TouchStone<) Alabaster Gem Extract -- Gaardian 80 a shot of espresso -- Romani 80 Trandorfir Pani ---'---,{@ -- Dominion 60 Green Herbal Tea -- DoH 60 Mystical Touch -- Seekers 60 (Seekers) Potion of Lotus Stem -- Tanelorn 60 Tranquility's Blessed Lucidity -- loqui 60 :::Devil's Brew::: -- Tao 40 -=[ Meditation of the Jade Dragon ]=- -- Touchston 40 (>Touchstone<) Green Garnet Gem Extract -- Crusader 30 Celestial Beads -- Seekers 30 (Seekers) Potion of Lotus Seed -- Bard 20 Cheesy Nachos -- Academy 1 Academy Black Lotus Potion -- Aylor 1 (!(Lotus Rush)!)

regexCodeList.string: ^(?:\([ ]*(\d+)\)| ) (?:\(.*?\) |)(?:Moonlight Wine|\(!\(Lotus Rush\)!\)|Sigil of Solitude|Meade of the Gods|Flourish of Magic|Philter of Peace|Prosperity|Ancestral Power|Bag o' Buttery Showtime Popcorn|Terrill's Energy Tonic|Ice Cold Arnold Palmer|Epiphany|Vorel's Lightning|Call upon spirits|a shot of espresso|Green Herbal Tea|Mystical Touch|Tranquility's Blessed Lucidity|Celestial Beads|Cheesy Nachos|Academy Black Lotus Potion|:::Devil's Brew:::|:::Revolution's Calling:::|-=Shogun's Viagra Shot=-|-=\[ Essence of the Jade Dragon \]=-|-=\[ Blood of the Jade Dragon \]=-|-=\[ Meditation of the Jade Dragon \]=-|\^\*\^Darane Svatura\^\*\^|Trandorfir Pani ---'---,{@|-=\*\)Dragon's Breath\(\*=-|\(>TouchStone<\) Sardonyx Gem Extract|\(>Touchstone<\) Diamond Gem extract|\(>TouchStone<\) Amethyst Gem Extract|\(>Touchstone<\) Citrine Gem Extract|\(>TouchStone<\) Alabaster Gem Extract|\(>Touchstone<\) Green Garnet Gem Extract|\(Seekers\) Potion of Lotus Flower|\(Seekers\) Potion of Lotus Bloom|\(Seekers\) Potion of Lotus Bud|\(Seekers\) Potion of Lotus Stem|\(Seekers\) Potion of Lotus Seed).*\)$

Trigger.name: movePotionTracker
Trigger.script: aard.mpot = tonumber(matches[2]) or 1 local mv_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.mv, aard.maxmv)) Moves:setValue(aard.mv, aard.maxmv,"   "..aard.mv.."mv | "..string.format("%i", mv_pct).."%   ("..aard.mpot..")") -- Clan lvl Moves (refresh) -- Daoine 150 FaetorAde -- Dominion 100 a Refreshing Idea -- Bard 100 Song of the Traveller -- Seekers 100 No-Doze -- Touchston 85 (>TouchStone<) Ruby Gem Extract -- Chaos 50 {A Minor Rejuve} -- Crusader 50 Divine Refreshment -- Academy 1 Academy Refresh Potion -- Clan lvl Utility: -- Boot 60 [Potion] Military Breakfast heal,heal,black lotus,refresh -- Bard The Skeleton Key Rag pass door,fly,underwater breathing,true seeing -- Seekers 48 (Seekers) Elixir of Maneuverability pass door,fly,underwater breathing,invis

regexCodeList.string: ^(?:\([ ]*(\d+)\)| ) (?:\(.*?\) |)(?:FaetorAde|a Refreshing Idea|Song of the Traveller|No-Doze|Divine Refreshment|{A Minor Rejuve}|Academy Refresh Potion|\(>TouchStone<\) Ruby Gem Extract).*\)$

Trigger.name: consider all - mob string
Trigger.script: moveCursor(0, getLineNumber()) if matches[3] == " would be easy, but is it even worth the work out?" then--y hinsertText('|c550000-10 ') elseif matches[3] == " looks a little worried about the idea." then--y hinsertText('|c770000 -2 ') elseif matches[3] == " should be a fair fight!" then--y hinsertText('|c005500 -1 ') elseif matches[3] == " snickers nervously." then--y hinsertText('|c007700 +2 ') elseif matches[3] == " chuckles at the thought of you fighting" then--y hinsertText('|c009900 +5 ') elseif matches[3] == " would crush you like a bug!" then--y hinsertText('|c996622+21 ') elseif matches[3] == " would dance on your grave!" then--y hinsertText('|c996622+31 ') elseif matches[3] == " says 'BEGONE FROM MY SIGHT unworthy!'" then--y hinsertText('|c996622+41 ') elseif matches[3] == " into the ground." then--y hinsertText('|c550000-20 ') elseif matches[3] == " is weak compared to you." then--y hinsertText('|c770000 -5 ') elseif matches[3] == " while you can!" then--y hinsertText('|c009900+10 ') elseif matches[3] == " would be either very brave or very stupid." then--y hinsertText('|c996622+16 ') elseif matches[2] == "You would be completely annihilated by " then hinsertText('|c996622+51 ') end

regexCodeList.string: ^(?:\(.*\) |)(.*)((?: would be easy, but is it even worth the work out\?| looks a little worried about the idea.| should be a fair fight!| snickers nervously.| chuckles at the thought of you fighting| would crush you like a bug!| would dance on your grave!| says 'BEGONE FROM MY SIGHT unworthy!'))(?: him.| her.| it.|)$

^(?:|\(.*\) )(?:You would stomp |No Problem! |Best run away from |Challenging |You would be completely annihilated by )(.*)((?: into the ground.| is weak compared to you.| while you can!| would be either very brave or very stupid.))$
^(?:|\(.*\) )(You would be completely annihilated by )(.*)!$
^You will now receive experience. Happy leveling!$

Trigger.name: noexp on
Trigger.script: if aard.noexp ~= " *NO EXP*" then aard.noexp = " *NO EXP*" aard.qTimeNOexp() end

regexCodeList.string: ^You will no longer receive experience. Happy questing!$
^You have set your character to receive no experience points!$

Trigger.name: daily blessing
Trigger.script:
--18 Apr 2019 12:58:55 --echo("
 input date: "..matches[2]) --lastblessing="18 Apr 2019 12:58:55" aard.timerDaily = datetime:parse(matches[2], "%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S", true) aard.timerDaily = aard.timerDaily - 3600--workaround bug: https://github.com/Mudlet/Mudlet/issues/2514 --echo("
 epoch date: ") --display(aard.timerDaily)
--echo("
 epoch date, difference from now: ") --display(shms(getEpoch()-aard.timerDaily, true))
aard.timerDaily = aard.timerDaily + (aard.config["tdiff"]*60*60) + 82800--82800 = 23 hours which is the time between blessings --echo("
 output date: ")--1555621135 --display(aard.tdiff*60*60) --display(aard.timerDaily) onTick() --aard.qTimeNOexp()

regexCodeList.string: ^You received your last daily blessing at (.*)\.$
^.* DISARMS you and sends your .* flying\!$

Trigger.name: pupstat
Trigger.script:
aard.plevel = aard.clevel or math.floor(getEpoch()) aard.clevel = math.floor(getEpoch()) aard.ltime = "" local h,m,s = shms(aard.clevel-aard.plevel) if h ~= "00" then aard.ltime = "@W"..h.."@yh:" end if h ~= "00" or m ~= "00" then aard.ltime = aard.ltime.."@W"..m.."@ym:" end aard.ltime = aard.ltime.."@W"..s.."@ys"
--aard.ltime 00h:02m:40s
aard.levelstat = { [aard.clevel]={level=gmcp.char.status.level,zone=gmcp.room.info.zone,train=0,lucky=0,bt=0,db=0,str=0,int=0,wis=0,dex=0,con=0,luck=0,}, } aard.levelreport = true
function pupreport() local trainsum = tonumber(aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].train) + tonumber(aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].lucky) + tonumber(aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].bt) + tonumber(aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].db) aard.pupstr = "@ypup: @W"..aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].train if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].lucky ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@W"..aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].lucky end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].bt ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@W"..aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].bt end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].db ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@W"..aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].db end aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y = @W"..trainsum.."@ytrains " local statspace = "" if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].str ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@Wstr" statspace = " " end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].int ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@Wint" statspace = " " end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].wis ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@Wwis" statspace = " " end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].dex ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@Wdex" statspace = " " end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].con ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@Wcon" statspace = " " end if aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].luck ~= 0 then aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr.."@y+@Wluck" statspace = " " end local xpmob = math.floor(aard.mobexp/aard.mobcount)
local secs = aard.clevel-aard.plevel local xpsec = aard.mobexp/secs local xpmin = math.floor(xpsec*60)
--aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr..statspace..aard.ltime.." @W"..aard.mobcount.."@ymobs (@W"..xpmob.."@yxp/mob @W"..xpmin.."@yxp/min)" aard.pupstr = aard.pupstr..statspace..aard.ltime --StatMonitor: Gained a pup: 3+1 = 4 trains int+wis bonus 01m:58s 14 mobs killed (63.93xp/mob 508xp/min) --titan/terra i hear are 4/5 man max
if gmcp.group then if gmcp.group.count then if gmcp.group.count < 5 then send("gt "..aard.pupstr) end end else send("gt "..aard.pupstr) end --decho("All", "<50,50,0:0,255,0>test") --128-128-0 --255-255-255
--reset values aard.mobcount = 0 aard.mobexp = 0
setTriggerStayOpen("pupstat",0) end
timerID = tempTimer(2, [[pupreport()]])--report in 2 seconds, all level up data should be recorded by then.
--You raise a level! You are now level 70. --Congratulations, hero. You have increased your powers!

regexCodeList.string: Congratulations, hero. You have increased your powers!

Trigger.name: trains
Trigger.script:
aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].train = matches[2]
--You gain 3 trains. --Lucky! You gain an extra 2 training sessions! --You gain 1 additional training session from your enhanced battle learning. --You gain a bonus Wisdom point! --You gain a bonus Intelligence point!

regexCodeList.string: ^You gain (\d+) train[s]*\.$

Trigger.name: lucky
Trigger.script:
aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].lucky = matches[2]
--You gain 3 trains. --Lucky! You gain an extra 2 training sessions! --You gain 1 additional training session from your enhanced battle learning. --You gain a bonus Wisdom point! --You gain a bonus Intelligence point!

regexCodeList.string: ^Lucky! You gain an extra (\d+) training session[s]*!$

Trigger.name: Battle Training
Trigger.script:
aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].bt = matches[2]
--You gain 3 trains. --Lucky! You gain an extra 2 training sessions! --You gain 1 additional training session from your enhanced battle learning. --You gain a bonus Wisdom point! --You gain a bonus Intelligence point! --You gain 6 extra trains daily blessing bonus.

regexCodeList.string: ^You gain (\d+) additional training session[s]* from your enhanced battle learning\.$

Trigger.name: Daily Blessing
Trigger.script:
aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].db = matches[2]
--You gain 3 trains. --Lucky! You gain an extra 2 training sessions! --You gain 1 additional training session from your enhanced battle learning. --You gain a bonus Wisdom point! --You gain a bonus Intelligence point! --You gain 6 extra trains daily blessing bonus.

regexCodeList.string: ^You gain (\d+) extra train[s]* daily blessing bonus\.$

Trigger.name: Stat
Trigger.script:
if matches[2] == "Strength" then aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].str = aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].str+1 elseif matches[2] == "Intelligence" then aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].int = aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].int+1 elseif matches[2] == "Wisdom" then aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].wis = aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].wis+1 elseif matches[2] == "Dexterity" then aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].dex = aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].dex+1 elseif matches[2] == "Constitution" then aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].con = aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].con+1 elseif matches[2] == "Luck" then aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].luck = aard.levelstat[aard.clevel].luck+1 end
--You gain 3 trains. --Lucky! You gain an extra 2 training sessions! --You gain 1 additional training session from your enhanced battle learning. --You gain a bonus Wisdom point! --You gain a bonus Intelligence point!

regexCodeList.string: ^You gain a bonus (\w+) point!$

Trigger.name: Finger
Trigger.script:
if not aard.playerdb then aard.playerdb = aard.playerdb or {} if io.exists(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/config-playerdb.lua") then table.load(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/config-playerdb.lua", aard.playerdb) else table.save(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/config-playerdb.lua", aard.playerdb) end end
function delPlayerNote(player) if aard.playerdb[player] then aard.playerdb = table.removeKey(aard.playerdb, player) end end
if aard.playerdb[matches[2]] then decho("\n<255,255,255>Note: ") dechoLink("<51,102,255>"..aard.playerdb[matches[2]], "printCmdLine'playernote "..matches[2].." "..aard.playerdb[matches[2]].."'", "Click to edit Note for this Player.", true) echo(" ") dechoLink('<192,0,0>[x]', 'delPlayerNote("'..matches[2]..'")', 'Click to delete the Note for '..matches[2], true) --dechoLink("<192,0,0>[x]", "printCmdLine'playernote delete "..matches[2].."'", "Click to delete the Note for this Player.", true) else decho("\n<255,255,255>Note: ") dechoLink("<51,102,255>[Add Note]", "printCmdLine'playernote "..matches[2].." '", "Click to set a Note for this Player.", true) end

regexCodeList.string: ^You feel as if you are being watched\.$
^\*\* You can take revenge on \w+ for \d+ minutes\.$

Trigger.name: War
Trigger.script: if tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) >= tonumber(matches[2]) and tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) <= tonumber(matches[3]) then selectCurrentLine() copy() appendBuffer("Private") appendBuffer("All") appendBuffer("Group") aard.audioAlert("Alert") end

regexCodeList.string: ^WARFARE\: .* has been declared by \w+ for levels (\d+) to (\d+)!$

Trigger.name: Gquest
Trigger.script: if tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) >= tonumber(matches[2]) and tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) <= tonumber(matches[3]) then selectCurrentLine() copy() appendBuffer("Private") appendBuffer("All") appendBuffer("Group") aard.audioAlert("Gquest") end

regexCodeList.string: ^Global Quest\: Global quest # \d+ has been declared for levels (\d+) to (\d+) \- .*\.$
^Remort Auction\: .*$
^(\w+) (?:has|tried to) invite[d]* you to join group\: (.*)\.
^Global Quest\: Global Quest # \d+ has been won by \w+ \- \d+(?:th|st|rd) win\.$

Trigger.name: capture remote socials
Trigger.script: selectCurrentLine() local r,g,b = getFgColor() --echo("\n"..r.."-"..g.."-"..b.."\n") if r == 0 and g == 128 and b == 128 then copy() appendBuffer("Private") appendBuffer("All") appendBuffer("Group") end

Trigger.name: gag clan
Trigger.script: if gmcp.room then if gmcp.room.info then if gmcp.room.info.num == 47195 then--Boot cRecal deleteLine() end end end

regexCodeList.string: ^\w+ considers (?:his|her) chances of taking on the whole room!$
^\w+ stops holding \]An Old Duffle Bag\[\.$
^\w+ holds .* in (?:his|her) hand\.$
^\w+ stops using .* as a portal.$
^\w+ equips .* as a portal\.$
^\w+ removes Aardwolf Ring of Invisibility from (?:his|her) left finger\.$
^\w+ wears Aardwolf Ring of Invisibility on (?:his|her) left finger\.$
^\w+ stops wielding .* in (?:his|her) off-hand\.$
^\w+ wields .* in (?:his|her) off-hand\.$

Trigger.name: quest
Trigger.script: aard.qtime = 0 aard.qTimeNOexp() selectCurrentLine() copy() appendBuffer("Private") appendBuffer("All") appendBuffer("Group") aard.audioAlert("Quest")

regexCodeList.string: ^QUEST: You may now quest again.$

Trigger.name: pheal
Trigger.script: --party heal cast counter --add a way to track my own pheals, possibly with a keybinding or something that adds to the values when casting it if gmcp.group then if aard.group[matches[2]] then aard.group[matches[2]].pheal = aard.group[matches[2]].pheal + 1 end if gmcp.group.count then if gmcp.group.count > 4 then deleteLine() end end end

regexCodeList.string: ^(\w+) chants the phrase 'party heal'\.$

Trigger.name: gag
Trigger.script: --spamreduce groupexp if gmcp.group then if gmcp.group.count then if gmcp.group.count > 1 then deleteLine() end end end

regexCodeList.string: ^You are already fully healed\.$
^You are already fully refreshed\.$
^You are now fully healed\.$
^You feel fully refreshed\!$
^\w+ is already fully healed\.$
^\w+ is already fully refreshed\.$
^\w+ is now fully healed\.$
^\w+ now feels fully refreshed\.$
^\w+ heals (?:him|her)self\.$

Trigger.name: damage
Trigger.script:
local crit = matches[2] local attacker = matches[3] local attack = matches[4] local target = matches[5] local damage = matches[6] local holyreprisal = matches[7] --track by cumulative since group join/create --but also track since last experience message aard.group = aard.group or {} local v = "" if string.sub(attacker, -2) == "'s" then v = attacker:sub(1, -3) elseif string.sub(attacker, -2) == "s'" then v = attacker:sub(1, -2) else v = gmcp.char.base.name end
if gmcp.group then if aard.group[v] then aard.group[v].alldam = tonumber(aard.group[v].alldam) + tonumber(damage)
if aard.group[v][attack] then aard.group[v][attack] = tonumber(aard.group[v][attack]) + tonumber(damage) else aard.group[v][attack] = tonumber(damage) end end
if gmcp.group.count then if gmcp.group.count > 4 then if aard.group[attacker:sub(1, -3)] or aard.group[attacker:sub(1, -2)] then deleteLine() elseif string.find(attacker, "'") and target ~= "You" then deleteLine() end end end end

Trigger.name: wheretarget
Trigger.script:
--echo("
Fired
") --display(matches[4]) aard.qTarget = matches[2]..matches[3] aard.qRoom = matches[4]:trim() --echo("
target: "..aard.qTarget) --echo("
room: "..aard.qRoom) if getRoomArea(aard.map.seen_room) then aard.qArea = getRoomAreaName(getRoomArea(aard.map.seen_room)) --echoRoomListArea(aard.qArea) echoRoomListArea(getRoomArea(gmcp.room.info.num)) end disableTrigger("wheretarget")

regexCodeList.string: ^Players near you\:$

Trigger.name: wherecap
Trigger.script:
--echo("
Fired
") --display(matches[4]) aard.qTarget = matches[2]..matches[3] aard.qRoom = matches[4]:trim() --echo("
target: "..aard.qTarget) --echo("
room: "..aard.qRoom) if getRoomArea(aard.map.seen_room) then aard.qArea = getRoomAreaName(getRoomArea(aard.map.seen_room)) --echoRoomListArea(aard.qArea) echoRoomListArea(getRoomArea(gmcp.room.info.num)) end

Trigger.name: endwhere
Trigger.script: if string.find(matches[2], " ") or string.find(matches[2], "near") then --do nothing else setTriggerStayOpen("where",0) end

Trigger.name: qtarget scan highlight
Trigger.script:
--display(matches[2]) local aq = { ["A lovebird"]="[AQ] - bird song (RARE), [AQ] - a blade of grass", ["A spider"]="[AQ] - a spider web", }
if aard.qTarget then if string.lower(aard.qTarget) == string.lower(matches[2]) then hecho(" |c990000[TARGET]??") end elseif aq[matches[2]] then hecho(" |c990000"..aq[matches[2]]) elseif aard.cTarget then for i, name in pairs(aard.cTarget) do if string.lower(name) == string.lower(matches[2]) then hecho(" |c990000[TARGET]??") end end end

Trigger.name: cp level
Trigger.script: --toggle noexp back off --in scripts section look at "config" cplvl and set to 0 to disable noexp cp toggle if matches[2] then aard.cpLevel = tonumber(matches[2]) else aard.cpLevel = tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) end if aard.noexp == " *NO EXP*" and tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) <= aard.cpLevel and tonumber(gmcp.char.status.level) <= aard.config["cplvl"] then aard.noexp = "" aard.qTimeNOexp() send("noexp")--turn noexp back on end

regexCodeList.string: .* tells you 'Good luck in your campaign!'$

Trigger.name: cp check
Trigger.script:
selectString( "You still have to kill ", 1 ) replace("") if not aard.cpLevel then aard.cpLevel = aard.cpLevel or 0 send("cp info",false) end aard.qTarget = matches[2] if aard.areaInfo[matches[3]] then --local areaID = findAreaID(aard.areaInfo[matches[3]].zone) local areaID = lookupAreaID(aard.areaInfo[matches[3]].zone) local areaExits = getAreaExits(areaID) -- check area exits and figure out which room has the shortest path cost, its likely the entrance. if not areaExits[1] then--must be noexit/portal entrance --check all path costs and choose the lowest cost local roomlist = getAreaRooms(areaID) -- obtain a room list for each of the room IDs we got lowestcost = 9000 tryroom = 0 for _, id in pairs(roomlist) do local pathable,cost = getPath(aard.map.current_room,id) if pathable == true and cost < lowestcost then lowestcost = cost tryroom = id end end echo(" ") hechoLink("|cFF0000-"..tryroom, [[gotoRoom(]]..tryroom..[[)]], "runto "..tryroom, true)
elseif not areaExits[2] then--only one possible room echo(" ") --display(areaExits[1]) hechoLink("|cFF0000"..areaExits[1], [[gotoRoom(]]..areaExits[1]..[[)]], "runto "..matches[3], true) else--multiple exits
lowestcost = 9000 tryroom = 0 for _, id in pairs(areaExits) do local pathable,cost = getPath(aard.map.current_room,id) if pathable == true and cost < lowestcost then lowestcost = cost tryroom = id end end echo(" ") hechoLink("|cFF0000"..tryroom, [[gotoRoom(]]..tryroom..[[)]], "runto "..tryroom, true)
end else --aard.roomFind(matches[3])--must be a room cp echoRoomList(matches[3]) --echoRoomListArea(aard.qAreaID) end

regexCodeList.string: ^You still have to kill \* (.*) \((.*?)\)$

Trigger.name: qArea
Trigger.script: aard.qArea = matches[2] if aard.areaInfo[aard.qArea] then echoRoomListAreaSearch(aard.areaInfo[aard.qArea].zone) else echo("\nArea Not found.") end

regexCodeList.string: ^(?:The Statue of Calliope|A Grumpy Old General|Questor) tells you 'of (.*)\.'$
^is in the general area of (.*)\.$
^(?:The Statue of Calliope|A Grumpy Old General|Questor) tells you 'of (.*) which is in the general area'$
.* can be found in the vicinity of (.*) which$
^(?:The Statue of Calliope|A Grumpy Old General|Questor) tells you 'Seek (.*) out somewhere in the vicinity'$
^You are on a quest to slay (.*)\!$

Trigger.name: stats

regexCodeList.string: (?:\| Stat Mods \:|\| Resist Mods\:|\| Skill Mods \: Modifies|\| Spells \: \d+ (?:use|uses) of level|\| \: \d+ (?:use|uses) of level|\|| ) ([a-zA-Z0-9]+(?: [a-zA-Z]+)*)[ ]*(?:\: \+|\: |by \+| ')[ ]*([a-zA-Z0-9,+->]+(?: [a-zA-Z]+)*)[']*

Trigger.name: furnitureHeal

regexCodeList.string: \| Heal Rate \: Health \[(\d+)\] Magic \[(\d+)\] (?:| | | | ) \|
^\| \: Items inside weigh (.*)% of their usual weight[ ]* \|$

Trigger.name: endCapture
Trigger.script: if matches[2] =="+-----------------------------------------------------------------+" or string.find(matches[2], "\|") then --do nothing else --echo("\nFIRED") setTriggerStayOpen("item",0) end

Alias.name: gui
Alias.script: --type gui to reload your the gui. guiLoad()

Alias.name: vconfig
Alias.script:
--(?:\| Stat Mods \:|\| Resist Mods\:|\| Skill Mods \: Modifies|\| Spells \: \d+ (?:use|uses) of level|\| \: -- \d+ (?:use|uses) of level|\|| ) ([a-zA-Z0-9]+(?: [a-zA-Z]+)*)[ ]*(?:\: \+|\: |by \+| ')[ ]*([a-zA-Z0-9,+->]+(?: [a-zA-Z]+)*)[']*
--aard.config["hpot"]="elixir", --aard.config["mpot"]="moonlight", --aard.config["vpot"]="refreshing", --aard.config["pbag"]="bag", --aard.config["port"]="hold duff;enter;hold flute", --aard.config["attack1"]="hammer", --aard.config["debuff1"]="marbu", --aard.config["debuff2"]="dirt", --aard.config["cplvl"]=150, --aard.config["cpexp"]=700, --aard.config["group"]=1, --aard.config["tdiff"]=-3, --aard.config["speak"]="false",
--display(matches[2]) --display(matches[3])
if matches[2] and matches[3] then if aard.config[matches[2]] ~= nil then local arg = string.gsub(matches[3],"|",";") --if matches[3] has space then surround with single quotes aard.config[matches[2]] = arg if gmcp.char.base.name then table.save(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/config-"..gmcp.char.base.name..".lua", aard.config) end else echo("\n"..matches[2].." is Not a valid option.\n") end elseif matches[2] then echo("\nNo Argument Provided for option.\n") end --lua display(getFgColor()) decho("<51,102,255>-vconfig- <192,192,192> seperate multiple commands with <51,102,255>|<192,192,192> instead of <51,102,255>;") echo("\n\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Recall Portal: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["port"], "printCmdLine'vconfig port "..string.gsub(aard.config["port"],";","|").."'", "Click to set the Recall Portal to use.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Wielded Weapon: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["wield"], "printCmdLine'vconfig wield '", "Click to set the Wielded Weapon to use.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Dual Weapon: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["dual"], "printCmdLine'vconfig dual '", "Click to set the Dualwielded Weapon to use.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Health Potion: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["hpot"], "printCmdLine'vconfig hpot '", "Click to set the Health Potion to use.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Mana Potion: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["mpot"], "printCmdLine'vconfig mpot '", "Click to set the Mana Potion to use.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Moves Potion: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["vpot"], "printCmdLine'vconfig vpot '", "Click to set the Moves Potion to use.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Potion Container: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["pbag"], "printCmdLine'vconfig pbag '", "Click to set the Potion Container to use.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Primary Attack: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["attack1"], "printCmdLine'vconfig attack1 '", "Click to set the Primary Attack to use.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Primary Debuff: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["debuff1"], "printCmdLine'vconfig debuff1 '", "Click to set the Primary Debuff to use.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>2nd Debuff: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["debuff2"], "printCmdLine'vconfig debuff2 '", "Click to set the 2nd Debuff to use.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>CP Level Until: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["cplvl"], "printCmdLine'vconfig cplvl '", "Click to set the level to CP Level until.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>CP Level noexp limit: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["cpexp"], "printCmdLine'vconfig cpexp '", "Click to set the CP Level noexp toggle amount.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Group Frame Format: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["group"], "printCmdLine'vconfig group '", "Click to set the Group Frame Format until.", true)
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Mud Time Difference: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["tdiff"], "printCmdLine'vconfig tdiff '", "Click to set the Time Difference from Mud Time.", true) echo("\n")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>Speak alerts instead of sounds: ") setFgColor(51,102,255) echoLink(aard.config["speak"], "printCmdLine'vconfig speak '", "Click to override audio alerts with speech.", true) echo("\n")
setFgColor(192,192,192) echo("\n")

Alias.name: PlayerNotes
Alias.script:
if matches[2] and matches[3] then aard.playerdb[matches[2]] = matches[3] table.save(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/config-playerdb.lua", aard.playerdb) elseif matches[2] then echo("
Note to add for this player was missing, please include note to add.
") end
decho("<51,102,255>-playernote- <192,192,192> playernote <player> <note>") echo("

")
decho(" <51,102,255>- <192,192,192>"..matches[2]..": ") dechoLink("<51,102,255>"..aard.playerdb[matches[2]], "printCmdLine'playernote "..matches[2].." "..aard.playerdb[matches[2]].."'", "Click to edit Note for this Player.", true) echo("

")

Alias.name: guisave
Alias.script: --type guisave to save your UI positioning. GUIframe.saveSettings()

Alias.name: startermap
Alias.script: mapStarter()--call the mapStarter function which makes a backup, and if backup successfull loads the starter map.

Alias.name: loadmap
Alias.script:
local saveString = getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/mapBackup_"..getTime(true,"yyyy.MM.ddThh.mm.ss.zzz")..".dat" local savedok = saveMap(saveString)
if not savedok then echo("Couldn't save map :(\n") return 0--bail out, old map didnt save. else echo("Map saved to: "..saveString.."\n") loadMap(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/"..matches[2]) end

Alias.name: savemap
Alias.script:
--example: savemap mapStarter local savedok = saveMap(getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/"..matches[2]..".dat") if not savedok then echo("Couldn't save map :(\n") else echo("Map saved to: "..getMudletHomeDir().."/aardwolf/"..matches[2]..".dat\n") end
--lua display(getMapUserData("last_modified")) --lua display(getAllMapUserData())

Alias.name: enter portal
Alias.script: if matches[2] then display(matches[2]) setRoomChar(gmcp.room.info.num, ">") aard.other = true send("enter "..matches[2],false) end

Alias.name: where
Alias.script: if matches[2] then enableTrigger("wheretarget") send("where "..matches[2],false) else--argument/target missing send("where",false) end

Alias.name: runto rt
Alias.script: if string.match("sendhian", matches[2]:lower()) then send("run 2s10e2n7e7n11e4n4e;enter hole")--vidblain tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(20286)]]) elseif string.match("light", matches[2]:lower()) then send("runto light",false)--light clanhall elseif string.match("darklight", matches[2]:lower()) then send("run 2s10e2n7e7n11e4n4e;enter hole")--vidblain tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(19643)]]) elseif string.match("imperial nation", matches[2]:lower()) then send("run 2s10e2n7e7n11e4n4e;enter hole")--vidblain tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(16966)]]) elseif string.match("the witches of omen tor omentor", matches[2]:lower()) then send("run 2s10e2n7e7n11e4n4e;enter hole")--vidblain tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(15578)]]) elseif string.match("inferno", matches[2]:lower()) then send("run 2s8w47s22w10sw;enter crystal;run 10esd") elseif string.match("the partroxis", matches[2]:lower()) then gotoRoom(5861)--partroxis else send("runto "..matches[2],false) end

Alias.name: vidblain
Alias.script: --run 2s10e2n7e7n11e4n4e;enter hole if string.match("sendhian", matches[2]) then tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(20286)]]) elseif string.match("darklight", matches[2]) then tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(19643)]]) elseif string.match("imperial nation", matches[2]) then tempTimer(1,[[aard.coordrun(16966)]]) else echo("gt no vidblain match for: "..matches[2]) end

Key.name: / health potion
Key.script: --to change the potion used, change "config" in Scripts section. send("get '"..aard.config["hpot"].."' "..aard.config["pbag"]..";quaf '"..aard.config["hpot"].."'",true) if aard.hpot > 0 then aard.hpot = aard.hpot -1 end local hp_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.hp, aard.maxhp)) Health:setValue(aard.hp, aard.maxhp,"   "..aard.hp.."hp | "..string.format("%i", hp_pct).."%   ("..aard.hpot..")")

Key.name: shift / health potion
Key.script: --to change the potion used, change "config" in Scripts section. send("get incomplete "..aard.config["pbag"]..";quaf incomplete",true) if aard.hpot > 0 then aard.hpot = aard.hpot -1 end local hp_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.hp, aard.maxhp)) Health:setValue(aard.hp, aard.maxhp,"   "..aard.hp.."hp | "..string.format("%i", hp_pct).."%   ("..aard.hpot..")")

Key.name: * mana potion
Key.script: --to change the potion used, change "config" in Scripts section. send("get '"..aard.config["mpot"].."' "..aard.config["pbag"]..";quaf '"..aard.config["mpot"].."'",true) if aard.spot > 0 then aard.spot = aard.spot -1 end local mp_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.mp, aard.maxmp)) Mana:setValue(aard.mp, aard.maxmp,"   "..aard.mp.."mp | "..string.format("%i", mp_pct).."%   ("..aard.spot..")")

Key.name: - move potion
Key.script: --to change the potion used, change "config" in Scripts section. send("get '"..aard.config["vpot"].."' "..aard.config["pbag"]..";quaf '"..aard.config["vpot"].."'",true) if aard.mpot > 0 then aard.mpot = aard.mpot -1 end local mv_pct = tostring(getPercent(aard.mv, aard.maxmv)) Moves:setValue(aard.mv, aard.maxmv,"   "..aard.mv.."mv | "..string.format("%i", mv_pct).."%   ("..aard.mpot..")")

Key.name: + spellup / attack spell
Key.script: if aard.state == 8 then send(aard.config["attack1"],true)--in combat else send("napalm;spellup int;spellup wis;spellup luck;spellup stats;spellup",true)--out of combat end

Key.name: shift + pre-spellup
Key.script: send("c 'intellect fortress';c awakening;c perception;c 'self harmony';c calculation;napalm")

Key.name: . scan / debuff
Key.script: if aard.state == 8 then send(aard.config["debuff1"],true)--in combat, debuff else send("scan",true)--out of combat, cleanse end

Key.name: 7 con all / else combat
Key.script: if aard.state == 8 then send(aard.config["debuff2"],true)--in combat else send("con all",true)--out of combat end

Key.name: 1 portal
Key.script: send(aard.config["port"])

Key.name: 3 Down
Key.script: openDoor("down") send("d",true)

Key.name: 9 Up
Key.script: openDoor("up") send("u",true)

Key.name: 4 West
Key.script: openDoor("w") send("w",true)

Key.name: 6 East
Key.script: openDoor("e") send("e",true)

Key.name: 2 South
Key.script: openDoor("s") send("s",true)

Key.name: 8 North
Key.script: openDoor("n") send("n",true)

Key.name: 0 key
Key.script: if aard.state == 8 then send(aard.config["debuff2"],true)--in combat else send("score",true)--out of combat end

Key.name: F4 roomcount area
Key.script:
local myRoomsTable = getRooms() local count = count or 0 for _ in pairs(myRoomsTable) do count = count + 1 end echo("
The map has " .. count .. " rooms mapped.
")
local areaId = getRoomArea(getPlayerRoom()) local myAreaRoomsTable = getAreaRooms(areaId) local count = 1 + #myAreaRoomsTable echo("
The area " .. getAreaTableSwap()[areaId] .. " has " .. count .. " rooms mapped.
")
for j, room_id in pairs(myAreaRoomsTable) do --echo("roomID:"..room_id.." Z:") local x,y,z = getRoomCoordinates(room_id) if z ~= 0 then hechoLink("|cFF0000roomID:"..room_id..".
", [[gotoRoom(]]..room_id..[[)]], "runto", true) --aard.roomFind(tostring(room_id)) end end send("explored",true)

Key.name: shift+F4 print names area
Key.script:
local myRoomsTable = getRooms() local count = count or 0 for _ in pairs(myRoomsTable) do count = count + 1 end echo("
The map has " .. count .. " rooms mapped.
")
local areaId = getRoomArea(getPlayerRoom()) local myAreaRoomsTable = getAreaRooms(areaId) local count = 1 + #myAreaRoomsTable echo("
The area " .. getAreaTableSwap()[areaId] .. " has " .. count .. " rooms mapped.
")
for j, room_id in pairs(myAreaRoomsTable) do --echo("roomID:"..room_id.." Z:") echo("
"..room_id..": "..getRoomName(room_id)) local x,y,z = getRoomCoordinates(room_id) if z ~= 0 then hechoLink("|cFF0000roomID:"..room_id..".
", [[gotoRoom(]]..room_id..[[)]], "runto", true) --aard.roomFind(tostring(room_id)) end end echo("
") send("explored",true)

Key.name: F5 area exits check
Key.script:
--I used this hotkey while checking which zones to delete for a startermap. --So that I could preserve parts of areas that lead to other areas. (areas that are not linked from the continents.)
--part that lists area room count local myRoomsTable = getRooms() local count = count or 0 for _ in pairs(myRoomsTable) do count = count + 1 end --echo("
The map has " .. count .. " rooms mapped.
")
local areaId = getRoomArea(getPlayerRoom()) local myAreaRoomsTable = getAreaRooms(areaId) local count = 1 + #myAreaRoomsTable echo("
The area " .. getAreaTableSwap()[areaId] .. " has " .. count .. " rooms mapped.

")
--part that lists rooms not on the 0 z axis for j, room_id in pairs(myAreaRoomsTable) do --echo("roomID:"..room_id.." Z:") local x,y,z = getRoomCoordinates(room_id) if z ~= 0 then hechoLink("|cFF0000roomID:"..room_id..".
", [[gotoRoom(]]..room_id..[[)]], "runto", true) --aard.roomFind(tostring(room_id)) end end
--part that lists area exits local areaID = getRoomArea(getPlayerRoom()) local areaExits = getAreaExits(areaID)
if not areaExits[1] then--must be noexit/portal entrance --check all path costs and choose the lowest cost local roomlist = getAreaRooms(areaID) -- obtain a room list for each of the room IDs we got lowestcost = 9000 tryroom = 0 for _, id in pairs(roomlist) do local pathable,cost = getPath(aard.map.current_room,id) if pathable == true and cost < lowestcost then lowestcost = cost tryroom = id end end echo(getRoomName(tryroom).." ") hechoLink("|cFF0000-"..tryroom, [[gotoRoom(]]..tryroom..[[)]], "runto "..tryroom, true) --highlight room echo(" ") hechoLink("|c00FF00".."[h]", [[highlightRoom(]]..tryroom..[[,0,150,0,255,100,100,1,255,255)]], "highlight "..tryroom, true) if gmcp.room.info.num == tryroom then echo(" (current room)") end echo("
") elseif not areaExits[2] then--only one possible room local id = areaExits[1] echo(getRoomName(id).." ")
hechoLink("|cFF0000"..id, [[gotoRoom(]]..id..[[)]], "runto "..id, true) --highlight room echo(" ") hechoLink("|c00FF00".."[h]", [[highlightRoom(]]..id..[[,0,150,0,255,100,100,1,255,255)]], "highlight "..id, true) if gmcp.room.info.num == id then echo(" (current room)") end echo("
") else--multiple exits for _, id in pairs(areaExits) do echo(getRoomName(id).." ") hechoLink("|cFF0000"..id, [[gotoRoom(]]..id..[[)]], "runto "..id, true) --highlight room echo(" ") hechoLink("|c00FF00".."[h]", [[highlightRoom(]]..id..[[,0,150,0,255,100,100,1,255,255)]], "highlight "..id, true) if gmcp.room.info.num == id then echo(" (current room)") end echo("
") end end

Key.name: F7
Key.script:
sqlite3 = require "luasql.sqlite3" local env = sqlite3.sqlite3() local conn = env:connect(getMudletHomeDir()..'/aardwolf/equipment.sqlite3') print(env,conn)
status,errorString = conn:execute([[CREATE TABLE Armor ('id' INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, 'name' TEXT)]]) print(status,errorString )
status,errorString = conn:execute([[CREATE TABLE ArmorStats ('id' INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, 'stat' TEXT, 'val' INTEGER, 'fkid' INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (fkid) REFERENCES Armor(id))]]) print(status,errorString )
status,errorString = conn:execute([[INSERT INTO Armor (name) values('Aardwolf Aura of Sanctuary')]]) print(status,errorString )
cursor,errorString = conn:execute([[select * from Armor]]) print(cursor,errorString)
row = cursor:fetch ({}, "a")
while row do print(string.format("Id: %s, Name: %s", row.id, row.name)) row = cursor:fetch (row, "a") end
-- close everything cursor:close() conn:close() env:close()

Key.name: f8 portalroom
Key.script: --If you are going to use a portal action that does not use the keyword "enter" then press this keybinding beforehand, to indicate your about to use a portal. setRoomChar(gmcp.room.info.num, ">") aard.other = true
